_description: Principal Resolution — Hammer Citation Index. Each entry provides a validated public data point that supports diagnostic inference for one or more Institutional States.

citations.title: Only 21% of Employees Are Engaged at Work
citations.publication: State of the Global Workplace Report
citations.advisor_take: This isn't a motivation problem. When 79% of your people are disengaged, you have a leadership architecture problem. No ping-pong table fixes that.

citations.title: Manager Effectiveness Accounts for 70% of Team Engagement Variance
citations.advisor_take: Seventy percent. Not culture. Not comp. Not purpose. The manager. If you haven't fixed who you're putting in charge of people, you haven't fixed anything.

citations.title: Voluntary Turnover Costs Employers 33% of a Worker's Annual Salary
citations.advisor_take: Turnover isn't a feelings problem. It's a balance sheet problem. At 33% of annual salary per exit, you're funding your own dysfunction.

citations.title: 58% of Employees Would Trust a Stranger More Than Their Boss
citations.advisor_take: When your people trust strangers more than they trust you, the problem isn't communication style. It's a credibility gap that no town hall is going to close.

citations.title: Organizations With Clear Accountability Structures Are 2.5x More Likely to Outperform
citations.advisor_take: Accountability isn't a culture value. It's a structure. You can't will your way to 2.5x performance. You have to build it.

citations.title: Companies Lose $1 Trillion Annually to Voluntary Turnover
citations.advisor_take: Twelve zeros. That's the price tag on avoidable exits. And Gallup calls it 'fixable.' That's the part that should keep you up at night.

citations.title: Psychological Safety Is the #1 Predictor of Team Performance
citations.advisor_take: Google ran the numbers across 180 teams. The answer wasn't who was on the team. It was whether people felt safe enough to speak. If they don't, you're flying blind.

citations.title: Only 40% of Workers Know What Their Company Stands For
citations.advisor_take: You can't execute a strategy that most of your people can't describe. This isn't a branding problem. It's a leadership communication failure with a measurable cost.

citations.title: Employees Who Receive Regular Feedback Are 3x More Engaged
citations.advisor_take: Feedback isn't a nicety. It's a performance mechanism. Three times more engaged means three times more output per salary dollar. The silence is costing you.

citations.title: Toxic Workplace Culture Is 10.4x More Predictive of Attrition Than Compensation
citations.publication: Toxic Culture Is Driving the Great Resignation
citations.advisor_take: 10.4 times. Not comp. Not benefits. Not remote work policy. Culture. When people leave, they're not chasing money. They're escaping something you built.

citations.title: Burned-Out Employees Are 2.6x More Likely to Leave
citations.advisor_take: Burnout isn't an individual problem. It's an organizational output. If people are running on empty, you built the system that drained them.

citations.title: High-Trust Organizations Outperform Low-Trust Peers by 286% in Total Return
citations.advisor_take: 286%. That's not a soft number. That's compounding. The cost of low trust doesn't show up as a line item. It shows up as everything you left on the table.

_schema_notes.expansion_target: This seed schema contains 12 entries representing each State. Phase I build-out targets 100+ entries with minimum 6 citations per State ID.
advisor_take_rules: Each take must name a mechanism, not just a symptom
_schema_notes.indexing: citation_id is stable and permanent. Never reuse or reassign a retired ID.

severity_guide.1: Supporting context — corroborates but doesn't anchor a diagnosis
severity_guide.2: Moderate signal — one of several indicators
severity_guide.3: Clear signal — meaningful in conjunction with behavioral data
severity_guide.4: Strong signal — near-sufficient alone with corroborating financial data
severity_guide.5: Critical indicator — anchor citation for State assignment
